nasb.text: We ourselves will cross over armed in the presence of the Lord into the land of Canaan, and the possession of our inheritance shall remain with us across the Jordan.”

esv.text: We will pass over armed before the Lord into the land of Canaan, and the possession of our inheritance shall remain with us beyond the Jordan.”

cnv.text: 我們要武裝起來，在耶和華面前過河，到迦南地去；只是約旦河這邊的地方，要歸我們作產業。”

ccb.text: 我们一定带着兵器在耶和华面前过河，前往迦南，但我们要拥有约旦河东之地作产业。”
